title: AI Defaults
description: Always-installed AI infrastructure for Demo Builder projects — MCP servers added to every generated project alongside the demo-builder entry.

mcpServers.description: MCP servers installed via npm devDependency. Each entry is added to .claude/mcp.json and .mcp.json next to demo-builder, and its package is added as a devDependency on the storefront's package.json before npm install runs.

id.description: Stable identifier used as the key in the generated .mcp.json mcpServers map.

package.description: npm package name installed as a devDependency on the storefront.

version.description: npm semver range (caret-pin matches Demo Builder's overall posture).

command.description: Command Claude Code runs to start the MCP server.

args.description: Arguments passed to command. Paths are relative to the cwd Claude Code launches from (the storefront root).

description.description: Human-readable description shown in the AI Configuration tab.
